name: Scale-Aware Learning of Chaotic Dynamics on Unstructured Meshes via Binned Spectral Losses
summary: arXiv:2607.19387v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Surrogate modeling for high-dimensional nonlinear dynamical systems that exhibit chaos requires mechanisms that preserve not only pointwise accurac...
description: arXiv:2607.19387v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Surrogate modeling for high-dimensional nonlinear dynamical systems that exhibit chaos requires mechanisms that preserve not only pointwise accuracy but also the scale-dependent structure of physical fields. Bandwise spectral power losses, such as the binned spectral loss function, provide such supervision on structured grids, where Fourier mode...
author: Kanad Sen, Romit Maulik
